mapper.insert: INSERT INTO solutions (algorithm, type, language, code, problem_id) VALUES (#{algorithm}, #{type}, #{language}, #{code}, #{problemId})
mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.algorithm, s.type, s.language, s.problem_id AS problemId, p.number AS problemNumber FROM solutions s JOIN problems p ON s.problem_id = p.id WHERE s.problem_id = #{problemId}
